case_title: MARIA LEON ET AL VS. CALIFORNIA MEDICAL BOARD ET AL
cause_of_action: OTHER CIVIL PETITIONS (PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE)

docket_entries.description: FILING FEES OF $450 PAID BY PLAINTIFF
NOTICE OF FILING AND TRANSMITTAL (TRANSFERRED FROM SANTA CRUZ COUNTY - CASE NO. CV176157)

LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT CALIFORNIA MEDICAL BOARD'S DEMURRER IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 17, 2013, ON THE COURT'S MOTION. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT CALIFORNIA MEDICAL BOARD'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PETITIONER FAILS TO STATE A CLAIM FOR WRIT RELIEF. THE PETITION AND ATTACHMENTS SHOW THAT RESPONDENT EXERCISED ITS DISCRETION IN REFUSING TO INVESTIGATE PETITIONER'S COMPLAINTS AND REFERRING THE MATTER TO THE DEPARTMENT OF MANAGED HEALTH CARE. THE COURT SIGNED THE ORDER THAT WAS SENT BY EMAIL. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
DEMURRER
Off Calendar Sep-17-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was uncontested. RESPONDENT CALIFORNIA MEDICAL BOARD'S DEMURRER is sustained without leave to amend. Petitioner fails to state a claim for writ relief. The petition and attachments show that respondent exercised its discretion in refusing to investigate petitioner's complaints and referring the matter to the Department of Managed Health Care. The Court signed the Order that was sent by email. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

DEMURRER
Off Calendar Jul-30-2013 Continued To Sep-17-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT CALIFORNIA MEDICAL BOARD'S DEMURRER is continued to September 17, 2013, on the Court's motion. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
